parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const c = $json.config; const start = new Date(c.startDate + 'T00:00:00-03:00').getTime(); const end = new Date(c.endDate + 'T23:59:59-03:00').getTime(); const params = new URLSearchParams({ start_date: String(start), end_date: String(end), max_results: String(c.maxResults), transaction_status: $json.currentStatus }); if ($json.pageToken) params.set('page_token', $json.pageToken); return c.hotmartSalesHistoryUrl + '?' + params.toString(); })() }}

parameters.jsCode:
const current = items[0]?.json || {};
return [{ json: { ok: true, message: 'Consulta Hotmart concluida.', summary: { ...(current.summary || {}), finishedAt: new Date().toISOString() } } }];
